core_values: Tactical Minimalism: Every pixel has a purpose.
Data Density: High information per square inch, but scannable.
Speed: Visuals must feel fast (italics, sharp edges, neon accents).
Trust: Financial data must look surgical and precise.
forbidden_elements: Rounded buttons (Use sharp or slightly rounded pill)
Symmetry (Use asymmetry to guide the eye)

typography.installation: Import from Google Fonts: Barlow Condensed (400, 600, 900), Manrope (400, 500, 700), JetBrains Mono (400, 700)

grid_strategy.feed: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(37,99,235,0.5)] transition-all duration-200 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

cards.base: bg-card border border-border/50 shadow-none hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.base: bg-background border-input ring-offset-background placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-sm border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for text. Use lighter grays (e.g., zinc-400) on dark backgrounds, never dark gray on black.

page_specific_rules.dashboard: Use the 'Tetris Grid' layout. Hero metric (Profit Potential) takes dominant space. Live feed must scroll automatically or feel 'alive' with pulsing indicators.
page_specific_rules.live_feed: Cards must be dense. Use 'Masonry' or 'Grid' layout. Quick action buttons (Analyze, Watch, Ignore) must be visible without hovering.
page_specific_rules.analysis_view: Split screen: Left side images/carousel, Right side data/metrics. Use progress bars for 'Damage Score'.
page_specific_rules.market_intel: Use heatmaps (green to red) for demand/supply. Large typography for key trends.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install required fonts: Barlow Condensed, Manrope, JetBrains Mono.
2. Setup Tailwind config with the specified color palette and dark mode defaults.
3. Create the 'AppLayout' component with a persistent sidebar and top bar.
4. Implement the 'Live Feed' using the specified grid layout and motion presets.
6. Ensure all 'money' values are formatted with the currency (CAD/USD) and use the mono font.
7. Use the provided image URLs for placeholders in the UI.
